summary: Successfully updated all Pulse scripts to use pulse_common for centralized path management
decisions: Added 'from pulse_common import PATHS, WORKSPACE' to all scripts
Removed sys.path.insert lines that are no longer needed
Replaced hardcoded '/home/workspace' with str(PATHS.WORKSPACE) or PATHS constants
Updated path constants to use PATHS.BUILDS, PATHS.SYSTEM_LEARNINGS, etc.
Maintained backward compatibility by not changing business logic
notes_for_orchestrator: All 9 Pulse scripts updated successfully. Import tests pass for all scripts. D2.1 pulse_common.py was not modified per instructions. The refactoring centralizes path management while maintaining all existing functionality.

changes_summary.pulse.py: Updated imports, replaced BUILDS_DIR/CONVERSATIONS_DB/SKILLS_DIR constants, fixed session_state_manager path
changes_summary.pulse_code_validator.py: Updated imports, replaced BUILDS_DIR and LESSONS_FILE constants
changes_summary.pulse_learnings.py: Updated imports, cleaned up duplicate constants, replaced all hardcoded paths
changes_summary.pulse_llm_filter.py: Updated imports, replaced BUILDS_DIR/LESSONS_FILE constants and artifact path
changes_summary.pulse_safety.py: Updated imports, replaced WORKSPACE constant and run_cmd default
changes_summary.pulse_file_routing.py: Updated imports, removed duplicate WORKSPACE definition
changes_summary.pulse_dashboard_sync.py: Updated imports, replaced BUILD_DIR and DEFAULT_OUTPUT constants
changes_summary.sentinel.py: Updated imports, replaced BUILDS_DIR and CONTROL_FILE constants
